MOTION For Award Of Costs Re Asset Investigation For Enforcement Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE INC.'S MOTION For Award Of Costs Re Asset Investigation For Enforcement Of Judgment -- GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ($650 of costs granted: $300 for investigative Co. and $350 attorney's fees) Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558
